title: valeriana officinalis var. exaltata
intro: Valeriana officinalis var. exaltata, also known as tall valerian or American valerian, is a perennial flowering plant in the valerian family that is native to North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative and antispasmodic effects, making it a popular natural remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and muscle cramps. The health benefits of valerian root include improved sleep quality, reduced stress levels, and relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Valerian root can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its sedative and relaxing effects.
